programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: In mysterious Venice, Joseph and Caesar begin training under the equally enigmatic Lisa Lisa. Let the Hamon “hell” begin!

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Under Lisa Lisa’s tutelage, Joseph and Caesar must endure their final test. But while Caesar hones his skills, Joseph is stunned by an ancient and unexpected foe.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Joseph returns to Lisa Lisa, unaware of the bizarre stowaway he has delivered. A possessed confidant then attacks, ultimately sending the crew to Switzerland, where another revelation awaits.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: A Race Toward the Brink
programme.desc: Stroheim is back from the brink, now as a cyborg designed to secure the great Red Stone. Kars, however, is not willing to concede and wages war, even as the stone hurtles toward an alpine cliff.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The match between Hisoka and Kastro is about to begin.

programme.title: Norbit, (2007, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Murphy stars as mild-mannered Norbit, who gets a second chance at love with his childhood sweetheart, Kate. However, obstacles may make this romance slightly more difficult than expected.

programme.title: Coming to America, (1988, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Join EDDIE MURPHY on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World. As an African Prince, it's time for him to find a princess. The mission leads him and his most loyal friend (ARSENIO HALL) to New York. Watch Murphy and Hall in classic cameo roles!

programme.title: Paid in Full, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: A young man from Harlem, forced to cope with the 1980s drug scene, builds an illegal empire, only to have a crisis of conscience. Featuring the hit soundtrack with songs by Eric B. & Rakim, Boogie Down Productions, Guy, and Jay-Z.

programme.title: John Henry, (2020, Drama)
programme.desc: John Henry (Terry Crews) is a quiet man with a violent past. When two immigrant kids on the run from his former gang leader (Chris "Ludacris" Bridges) stumble into his life, he must face his past to give them a future.

programme.title: Dreamgirls, (2006, Musical)
programme.desc: With showstopping performances by a star-studded cast, Dreamgirls soars with the amazing story of three female singers who learn that anything is possible when you hold on to your dreams.

programme.title: Paid in Full, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: A young man from Harlem, forced to cope with the 1980s drug scene, builds an illegal empire, only to have a crisis of conscience. Featuring the hit soundtrack with songs by Eric B. & Rakim, Boogie Down Productions, Guy, and Jay-Z.

programme.title: John Henry, (2020, Drama)
programme.desc: John Henry (Terry Crews) is a quiet man with a violent past. When two immigrant kids on the run from his former gang leader (Chris "Ludacris" Bridges) stumble into his life, he must face his past to give them a future.

programme.title: Dreamgirls, (2006, Musical)
programme.desc: With showstopping performances by a star-studded cast, Dreamgirls soars with the amazing story of three female singers who learn that anything is possible when you hold on to your dreams.

programme.title: Kickboxer, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: When kickboxing champ Eric Sloane is crippled in the ring by the evil Tong Po, Eric's younger brother, Kurt, seeks vengeance.

programme.title: Lionheart, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme is Lyon Gaultier, a deserter in the French Foreign Legion who travels to the USA and enters the gory world of bare-knuckled street fighting in order to make money to save his brother's life and family.

programme.title: Death Warrant, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: Action superstar Jean-Claude van Damme ("Bloodsport", "Cyborg") is a veteran undercover cop posing as an inmate in a dangerously corrupt state prison.

programme.title: Double Impact, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: Identical twins are separated at six months and raised on different continents. They reunite twenty-five years later to avenge the murder of their parents and reclaim their stolen family fortune.

programme.title: Timecop, (1994, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Max Walker, an officer for a security agency that regulates time travel, must fend for his life against a shady politician who's intent on changing the past to control the future.

programme.title: Knock Off, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme plays a fashion designer who must join forces with a C.I.A. agent to combat terrorism.

programme.title: Legionnaire, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Alain is a boxer in 1925 Marseille, France. When he doesn't take the dive paid to take by a mob boss, he has to split. He joins the Foreign Legion and is sent to Morocco. He makes 3 friends and they watch each other's backs.

programme.title: Replicant, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme squares off against his deadliest opponent yet -- himself -- when he stars as both a heinous serial killer and the replicated clone that scientists have constructed in order to kill him.

programme.title: The Order, (2002, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: Martial arts icon Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as a playboy criminal thrust into a dangerous world of ancient evil when he must investigate the disappearance of his archaeologist father. With Oscar winner Charlton Heston and Sofia Milos.

programme.title: Old School, (2003, Comedy)
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: Dick, (1999, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and Betsy Jobs and Arlene Lorenzo just want to have a good time. But during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Sausage Party, (2016, Comedy)
programme.desc: In this CG-animated movie, one sausage leads a group of supermarket products on a quest to discover the truth about their existence and what really happens when they become chosen to leave the grocery store.

programme.title: Private Parts, (1997, Comedy)
programme.desc: Private Parts follows Howard Stern’s amazing transformation from school nerd to media superstar.

programme.title: Dicks: The Musical, (2023, Musical)
programme.desc: Two self-obsessed businessmen discover they're identical twins and plot to reunite their eccentric divorced parents. A riotously funny and debaucherous musical starring Megan Thee Stallion, Nathan Lane, Megan Mullally, and Bowen Yang.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out, (2014, Comedy)
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed moms' night out. But to enjoy it, they need their husbands to watch the kids for a few hours-what could go wrong?

programme.title: Sausage Party, (2016, Comedy)
programme.desc: In this CG-animated movie, one sausage leads a group of supermarket products on a quest to discover the truth about their existence and what really happens when they become chosen to leave the grocery store.

programme.title: Good Burger, (1997, Comedy)
programme.desc: Kel are serving up laughs! They're the good guys in Good Burger, a zany comedy inspired by the popular Kel routine from Nickelodeon's hit series All That.

programme.title: Wayne's World, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: When a sleazy TV exec offers Wayne and Garth a contract to tape their late-night cable-access show at his network, they discover the road to the big time is full of gnarly twists and turns.

programme.title: As Good as It Gets, (1997, Dramedy)
programme.desc: A heartwarming story of three outcasts coping with the frustrations of life in New York City. Starring Jack Nicholson as a curmudgeon and Greg Kinnear as a gay artist who live in the same building with Helen Hunt, the waitress who changes their lives.

programme.title: Something's Gotta Give, (2003, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: An aging playboy finds that love is as serious as a heart attack when he falls for his girlfriend's mother. Too bad she's now dating his young doctor! There's only one way they can all get what they want: Something's Gotta Give.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days, (2003, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A "How to..." columnist agrees to write a first-hand account about what it takes to drive a man out of your life... in exactly 10 days.

programme.title: Failure to Launch, (2006, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Tripp, a 35 year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him. It’s free, he’s got a great room, and mom does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little…push.

programme.title: I Could Never Be Your Woman, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: A mother falls for a younger man while her daughter falls in love for the first time. Mother Nature messes with their fates.

programme.title: Two Night Stand, (2014, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A snowstorm forces two people who made an online connection to unwillingly extend their one-night stand.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days, (2003, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A "How to..." columnist agrees to write a first-hand account about what it takes to drive a man out of your life... in exactly 10 days.

programme.title: Failure to Launch, (2006, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Tripp, a 35 year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him. It’s free, he’s got a great room, and mom does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little…push.

programme.title: Haywire, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: A highly trained operative, is double crossed & left for dead by someone in her own agency. When things go haywire, she finds ways to turn the tables on her ruthless adversary.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Libby Parsons, who discovers that the husband she’s convicted of murdering staged his own “death” and framed her for the crime. Released on parole, she skips town to find him–and that puts parole officer Travis Lehman on her trail.

programme.title: Primal Fear, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: Courtroom thriller about a slick, hotshot lawyer (Richard Gere) who takes the seemingly unwinnable case of a young altar boy (Edward Norton) accused of murdering an eminent catholic priest.

programme.title: Striking Distance, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: Coming from a police family, Tom Hardy ends up fighting his uncle after the murder of his father. Tom believes the killer is another cop and goes on the record with his allegations. Demoted then to river duty, the killer taunts Tom.

programme.title: Zodiac, (2007, Thriller)
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Dragged Across Concrete, (2019, Thriller)
programme.desc: Two embittered police detectives (Mel Gibson and Vince Vaughn) descend into the criminal underworld and find more than they wanted waiting in the shadows.

programme.title: Haywire, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: A highly trained operative, is double crossed & left for dead by someone in her own agency. When things go haywire, she finds ways to turn the tables on her ruthless adversary.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: Trumbo, (2015, Biographical Drama)
programme.desc: Screenwriter Dalton Trumbo's career comes to a crushing halt in the 1940s when he and other Hollywood figures are blacklisted for their political beliefs as he goes to war with the U.S. government and studio bosses over words and freedom.

programme.title: Selena, (1997, Biographical Drama)
programme.desc: Young. Beautiful. Enormously gifted. At 23, Selena shone as a fresh star in a vibrantly new musical field. But just as she was poised to be the next pop-music sensation, her life was tragically cut short.

programme.title: My Week With Marilyn, (2011, Biographical Drama)
programme.desc: An assistant on the set of THE PRINCE AND THE SHOWGIRL documents the week he spent befriending Marilyn Monroe (Michelle Williams) and helping her escape the pressures of fame and Hollywood.

programme.title: Grace Of Monaco, (2015, Drama)
programme.desc: Academy Award®-winner Nicole Kidman captures the beauty and elegance of Grace Kelly in this true story of her transition from Hollywood starlet to Princess of Monaco.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: Colonel Terry Childers is a patriot and war hero. But when a peacekeeping mission he leads in Yemen goes terribly wrong, he finds himself facing a court-martial.

programme.title: Downsizing, (2017, Dramedy)
programme.desc: When scientists find a way to shrink humans to five inches tall, Paul and his wife decide to get small and live large in a luxurious downsized community. With endless possibilities in the tiny world, Paul realizes we are meant for something bigger.

programme.title: Short Term 12, (2013, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Short Term 12 follows Grace (Brie Larson), a twenty-something staff member at a foster care facility as she reckons with caring for the teens in her charge and her own past. This lovingly realized film finds truth and humor in unexpected places.

programme.title: Vicky Cristina Barcelona, (2008, Drama)
programme.desc: Two girlfriends on a summer holiday in Spain became enamored with the same painter, fully unaware that his ex-wife, with whom he still has a tempestuous relationship, is about to re-enter the picture.

programme.title: Wild Horses, (2015, Western)
programme.desc: A detective opens up a fifteen-year-old missing persons case and begins to suspect that the boy it belongs to was murdered - and that a local rancher was involved.

programme.title: Gallowwalkers, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: A cursed gunman (Wesley Snipes) whose victims come back from the dead recruits a young warrior to help in the fight against a gang of zombies.

programme.title: The Burrowers, (2009, Western)
programme.desc: In the 1870s Dakota Territories a family of settlers suddenly go missing, seemingly at the hands of hostile natives. However, when a group of explorers set out to find them it soon becomes apparent that something much more sinister is to blame.

programme.title: Bone Tomahawk, (2015, Thriller)
programme.desc: When a group of cannibal savages kidnaps settlers from the small town of Bright Hope, an unlikely team of gunslingers, led by Sheriff Hunt (Kurt Russell), sets out to bring them home.

programme.title: Brimstone, (2017, Western)
programme.desc: A triumphant thriller set in the menacing inferno of the old American West, Brimstone tells the story of Liz, a genuine survivor who is hunted by a vengeful Preacher for a crime she didn’t commit.

programme.title: Sweetwater, (2013, Western)
programme.desc: In the late 1800s, a fanatical religious leader, a renegade Sheriff, and a former prostitute collide in a blood triangle on the rugged plains of the New Mexico Territory.

programme.title: Frank and Jesse, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: After the defeat of the South in the Civil War and the murder of their younger brother, Frank and Jesse James seek their own brand of justice. As outlaws, they gain fame for their daring hold-ups of banks, trains, and stagecoaches.

programme.title: Gallowwalkers, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: A cursed gunman (Wesley Snipes) whose victims come back from the dead recruits a young warrior to help in the fight against a gang of zombies.

programme.title: Noah, (2014, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. "This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Bumblebee, (2018, Science fiction)
programme.desc: On a mission to protect Earth, the battle-scarred and broken Bumblebee is found and repaired by a teenager named Charlie. They must work together to save the planet from the evil Decepticons in this action-packed adventure for the whole family.

programme.title: Love and Monsters, (2020, Adventure)
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Push, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers, (2011, Super Swashbucklers)
programme.desc: A gifted ensemble cast sparks this bold retelling of Alexander Dumas’ classic tale of friendship and heroism. With Christoph Waltz as wily Cardinal Richelieu.

programme.title: Ne Zha, (2019, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A young boy, with the power to destroy the world, must choose between good and evil in order to break the shackles of fate and become the hero.

programme.title: Bumblebee, (2018, Science fiction)
programme.desc: On a mission to protect Earth, the battle-scarred and broken Bumblebee is found and repaired by a teenager named Charlie. They must work together to save the planet from the evil Decepticons in this action-packed adventure for the whole family.

programme.title: Love and Monsters, (2020, Adventure)
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Cujo, (1983, Horror)
programme.desc: While Donna and Vic Trenton struggle to save their rocky marriage, their son Tad befriends the loveable 200-lb St. Bernard who belongs to their mechanic.

programme.title: Chinatown, (1974, Thriller)
programme.desc: Jake Gittes, a private eye, uncovers a web of personal and political scandals while he is hired by a beautiful socialite to investigate her husband's extra marital affair.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein, (1994, Horror)
programme.desc: When the brilliant but unorthodox scientist Dr. Victor Frankenstein rejects the artificial man that he has created, the Creature escapes and later swears revenge.

programme.title: Cujo, (1983, Horror)
programme.desc: While Donna and Vic Trenton struggle to save their rocky marriage, their son Tad befriends the loveable 200-lb St. Bernard who belongs to their mechanic.

programme.title: Vacancy, (2007, Horror)
programme.desc: A suspenseful, classic thriller, in the tradition of Alfred Hitchcock, starring Luke Wilson and Kate Beckinsale, that will keep you on the edge of your seat and your heart pounding! Rated: R

programme.title: Apocalypto, (2006, Action)
programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.title: Drugstore June, (2024, Comedy)
programme.desc: After the pharmacy in her small town is robbed, a girl who still lives at home with her parents takes matters into her own hands to solve the crime, while at the same time trying to get over her ex-boyfriend and become more of an adult.

programme.title: Noah, (2014, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. "This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part - IV: The Final Chapter, (1984, Horror)

programme.title: Bones And All, (2022, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: In a world that cannot abide who they truly are, a young woman who is learning how to survive on the margins of society and an intense, disenfranchised drifter embark upon a road trip, searching for identity and chasing beauty in a perilous world.

programme.title: It Comes At Night, (2017, Horror)
programme.desc: After a mysterious apocalypse leaves the world with few survivors, two families forced to share a home form an uneasy alliance in an attempt to keep the outside evil at bay—only to learn that the true horror may come from within.

programme.title: The Craft: Legacy, (2020, Thriller)
programme.desc: In Blumhouse's continuation of the cult hit The Craft, an eclectic foursome of aspiring teenage witches get more than they bargained for as they lean into their newfound powers.

programme.title: Lamb, (2021, Thriller)

programme.title: Succubus, (2024, Horror)
programme.desc: A new father struggling with fatigue, emotional insecurities, and a failing marriage joins a dating app, only to swipe right on what may be an inhuman presence.

programme.title: Child's Play, (1988, Horror)

programme.title: Cherry 2000, (2017, Adventure)

programme.title: The Woman in Black, (2012, Horror)
programme.desc: Author Kipps (Daniel Radcliffe), a widowed lawyer, is sent to a remote village to sort out the affairs of a recently deceased eccentric. But upon his arrival, it soon becomes clear that everyone in the own is keeping a deadly secret.

programme.title: Eddie and the Cruisers, (1983, Independent Drama)

programme.title: Moonstruck, (1987, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Bull Durham, (1988, Romantic comedy)

programme.desc: Yusei and Crow set off to confront the Dark Signers in an effort to stop them from destroying the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: In an effort to save the Satellite Sector from being destroyed, Yusei agrees to face off against a former friend turned Dark Signer in a Shadow Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei confronts his former friend Kalin about their past in an effort to stop him from awakening the Army of Shadows.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: The safety of the world hangs in the balance as Yusei tries to figure out a way to outduel and outmaneuver the unstoppable power of Kalin's dark deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Leo is forced to take part in an extrasensory examination with the leader of the Arcadia Movement. Can Leo pass this pop quiz, or will this psychic showdown with Sayer leave Leo locked up forever?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With Lazar's creepy clowns about to crack Crow's defense, Crow hatches a plan to lull his opponent into a false sense of security so that his feathered friends can swoop in and swipe the last of Lazar's life points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei gets caught up in a web of lies after agreeing to square off against Roman, the leader of the Dark Signers.

programme.desc: As Luna searches the Spirit World for a way to free Ancient Fairy Dragon from her stone prison, Leo searches his deck for a card combo that will help him defeat Devack and his army of apes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When Luna's plan to free Ancient Fairy Dragon falls apart, Regulus must come to her rescue in order to save her and the Spirit World from Zeman's minus curse.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.desc: Sayer signs up for a Shadow Duel against a Dark Signer who's out for revenge while Akiza agrees to battle a dark and sinister supermodel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the battle between Signers presses on, Yusei turns to his trusty Stardust Dragon in an effort to keep the power of Akiza's Black Rose Dragon at bay.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With Yusei, Jack, Akiza and Luna all gathered together, Director Goodwin seizes the moment and decides to shed some light on the dark and formidable foes the four Signers will soon be battling.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: In an effort to rid the Satellite Sector of the Dark Signers, Crow ventures out and challenges a sinister looking sneak to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Crow challenges the newest member of the Dark Signers to a Turbo Duel, but before Crow's Blackwings can even take flight, his opponent unleashes an aerial assault of his own.
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the sky-high battle between Crow and Greiger heats up, Crow looks to elevate his game in order to ground Greiger's aerial attacks before they send him to the Netherworld forever.
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Crow turns to his feathered friends in a last ditch effort to take out Greiger's Earthbound Immortal. Can Crow and his Blackwing's rise to the occasion?
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 3

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Haunted by the memories of his last battle with Kalin, Yusei looks to bury the past by agreeing to duel his former friend in a rematch. Can Yusei defeat Kalin and seal the tower that this Dark Signer is guarding?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the rematch between Kalin and Yusei continues, Yusei must find a way to out-think and out-maneuver the dark power of Kalin's Earthbound Immortal before it sends him to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Roman challenges Yusei to a Shadow Duel at the site of the original Ener-D Reactor. Meanwhile, Director Goodwin decides to make an unexpected visit to the Satellite Sector to settle some unfinished business he has with his Dark Signer brother.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Roman rages on, Roman takes a time out to reveal the truth behind the original Ener-D Reactor's meltdown and the role Yusei's father played.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Jack agrees to Turbo Duel Carly in an effort to defeat the darkness that has taken control of her. Can Jack rid the evil that has come to possess this one-time roving reporter?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Jack kicks his duel into overdrive and summons his Red Dragon Archfiend in a desperate attempt to free Carly from the Dark Signers' control.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Hoping to finally find out the whereabouts of her long-lost brother, Misty challenges Akiza to a Shadow Duel in a maze of mirrors.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After unlocking Akiza's psychic powers, Sayer sets his sights on using them to get even with the Dark Signers for destroying the Arcadia Movement.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei, Jack and Crow face off against Goodwin in the ultimate Shadow Duel showdown.

programme.title: Queen hastily ties up the sleeping Big Mom and carries her to Onigashima leaving Udon to Babanuki. Babanuki uses a weapon that Queen made to threaten inmates and make them catch Luffy, but a mysterious figure emerges from the forbidden cell to save Luffy.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Brutal Ammunition! The Plague Rounds Aim at Luffy!

programme.title: Kawamatsu the Kappa is freed and stands up against Babanuki and his underlings! Listening to Old Man Hyo's suggestion, Raizo and Kiku reveal their true identities which give the desperate prisoners not only a shock but also some hope.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Start Fighting Back! Luffy and the Akazaya Samurai!

programme.title: Luffy faces those who are infected by the Plague Rounds and the non-infected prisoners who submit to the authority of Udon. To open their eyes, Luffy takes a measure that will risk his life. However, the Chief Warden Babanuki has something up his sleeve.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: We’re Here to Win! Luffy's Desperate Scream!

programme.title: The freed prisoners in Udon refuse to fight alongside Luffy because he is a pirate. Raizo and Old Man Hyo try their best to convince them, but an unexpected person stands up to bring the prisoners hope after taking down Kaido!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Warriors' Dream! Luffy's Conquer of Udon!

programme.title: After standing against Orochi, Zoro and Hiyori are chased by Orochi's ninja group. Meanwhile, Orochi is told that they captured Trafalgar Law as the people of the Flower Capital prepare for the upcoming Fire Festival.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Orochi's Hunting Party! The Ninja Group vs. Zoro!

programme.title: Nami and Franky join Kanjuro who has taken Yasuie's dead body to bury him with Oden, and together they hit the road. Robin, Usopp, and Brook are at the dock trying to figure out a way to pass through a check point.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Tension Rises in Onigashima! Two Emperors of the Sea Meet?!

programme.title: As the clash between Kaido and Big Mom continues, Queen looks for a way to get out of Onigashima. Meanwhile in Udon, Old Man Hyo finds his former allies, four bosses from each region.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hiyori's Confession! A Reunion at Bandit's Bridge!

programme.title: Zoro runs after the warrior-monk who took his Shusui and Kawamatsu shares with Hiyori his memory of a fox that was guarding the graves in Ringo. As they catch up to Zoro, they find a room filled with swords.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Its Name is Enma! Oden's Great Swords!

programme.title: As the day of the raid approaches, Law finds someone who might help him escape the prison and Kin'emon gathers up most of his main allies to discuss the raid plan. Meanwhile, at Onigashima, Kaido and Big Mom make a stunning declaration!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A New Alliance?! Kaido’s Army Gathers!

programme.title: Kin'emon, Momonosuke, and the others can't fight back tears when they hear that Hiyori is alive. Zoro is stunned by Enma's demonic power and its ties to him.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Ticking Down to the Great Battle! The Straw Hats Go into Combat Mode!

programme.title: The resolution that passed the Reverie and the incidents surrounding the conference stun people all over the world and corner the Seven Warlords of the Sea. Meanwhile, a Navy captain Koby secretly contacts someone who is currently in the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Big News! An Incident That Will Affect the Seven Warlords!

programme.title: Admiral Issho and Fleet Admiral Sakazuki argue over the abolition of the Seven Warlord system and the alliance of the two Emperors of the Sea. Meanwhile, ex-Fleet Admiral Sengoku teaches the young Navy soldiers about the legendary Rocks Pirates.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Legendary Battle! Garp and Roger!

programme.title: On the day of the Fire Festival, Orochi leaves the mainland of the Land of Wano heading for Onigashima where a big banquet will take place.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Rendezvous Port! The Land of Wano Act Three Begins!

programme.title: The night before the great battle, Orochi orders the destruction of the Sunny along with some bridges across the country to block Akazaya samurai's allies from their rendezvous.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Number-One Samurai in the Land of Wano! Here comes Kozuki Oden!

programme.title: When the angry mountain god, the giant boar, almost kills Kin'emon, Oden steps in. Kin'emon is impressed when he sees Oden's strength and pledges his life to serve him.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Tearfully Swearing Allegiance! Oden and Kin'emon!

programme.title: Oden transforms the wild land of Kuri into a habitable region and is made Daimyo over it. Then he meets Kawamatsu the Kappa and the two Minks, Dogstorm and Cat Viper, who become his followers like the others.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Changing Destiny! The Whitebeard Pirates Cast Ashore!

programme.title: Whitebeard and his crew dock at one of the ports in the Land of Wano with their broken ship and the news excites Oden. He runs to the port and asks Whitebeard to let him get on board the ship but the request is rejected.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Oden's journey finally begins. He is in awe of all the things that he has never seen before. And for the first time in his life, he becomes a wanted person and makes the headlines which catches the eye of a high-profile figure.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Whitebeard's Little Brother! Oden's Great Adventure!

programme.title: In the Land of Wano, the Shogun Sukiyaki falls critically ill and names Orochi proxy Shogun until Oden returns in case he dies.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Roger is amazed when he finds out that Oden can read the script on the Ponegliff since he believes it will guide him to the last, undiscovered island where no man has ever been.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Singing out loud, the Roger Pirates continue on with their journey. They soar up to the island above the clouds and go down into the deep sea to get to the island at the sea bottom.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Oden and the Roger Pirates head for the Land of Wano to obtain a copy of the Road Ponegliff. Oden sees Kin'emon and the others for the first time in years, but he immediately returns to the sea leaving his wife and children behind.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The King of the Pirates is Born! Arriving at the Last Island!

programme.title: After reaching Laugh Tale, Roger declares the disbanding of his pirate group and disembarks first. Oden gets dropped off at the Land of Wano and reunites with his family and retainers.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To the Land of Wano! The Roger Pirates Disband!

programme.title: Enraged by Orochi's tyrannical acts, Oden raids his castle in the Flower Capital and points his sword at Orochi. However, hours later, people who were waiting for Oden to come out after defeating Orochi see the unexpected.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sad News! The Opening of the Great Pirate Era!

programme.title: Oden keeps dancing naked in the Flower Capital and losing all the trust of the people. One day, Orochi comes to Kuri and reveals his evil plan for the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Raid! Oden and the Akazaya Nine!

programme.title: Kaido comes to the mainland along with his troops to fight against Oden and the Akazaya samurai who were on their way to raid Kaido's mansion. Even though Oden's group are unprepared and outnumbered, they fight hard to save the future of the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The End of the Battle! Oden vs. Kaido!

programme.title: Oden and the Akazaya members are sentenced to death by boiling in a pot. Oden asks for a chance to survive which is accepted by Kaido. Then, Oden enters the boiling pot holding his retainers over his head.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Boiled to Death! Oden's One-hour Struggle!

programme.title: As Oden continues trying to survive in the boiling pot holding his retainers over his head, people learn the truth from Shinobu and get shocked. At the same time, Oden tells his retainers the importance of opening the borders of the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Oden Wouldn't Be Oden If It Wasn't Boiled!

programme.title: As Kin'emon and the others run to Oden Castle to save Oden's family, the castle is set on fire and Kaido attacks Toki and her children.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Castle on Fire! The Fate of the Kozuki Clan!

programme.title: The day of the Fire Festival has finally come and the whole army is now getting ready to head for Onigashima to raid Kaido!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Back to the Present Day! 20 Years Later!

programme.title: The Straw Hats and thousands of allies who were supposed to be there are nowhere to be found, but Kin'emon and the others decide to set sail to the stormy sea in a small boat.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Sea Is For Pirates! Raid! To Onigashima!

programme.title: Luffy, Law, and Kid join the Akazaya samurai and begin to fight Kaido's army. The three rivals from the Worst Generation compete with each other as they attack the enemy fleet with their ultimate skills.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Worst Generation Charges in! The Battle of the Stormy Sea!

programme.title: The Akazaya members are surprised by help from their old mate and Kin'emon notices he made a big mistake which has luckily saved all his allies. As their battle against Kaido's army heats up, the cornered Kanjuro makes a stunning move.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Arrival, (2016, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: Push, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Snowpiercer, (2014, Science fiction)
programme.desc: After a failed global-warming experiment, a post-apocalyptic Ice Age has killed off nearly all life on the planet.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit, (2014, Thriller)
programme.desc: Jack Ryan must quickly evolve from soldier to analyst to full-fledged operative to stop a devastating terrorist plot against the United States.

programme.title: The Contractor, (2022, Action)
programme.desc: After being involuntarily discharged from the Marines, James Reed joins a paramilitary organization in order to support his family.

programme.title: Robocop, (1987, Action)
programme.desc: Detroit in the near future. A cop who dies in the line of duty is transformed into a crime-fighting cyborg by the corporation which now runs the police department. The only hitch: this "perfect" cop still seeks revenge on the creeps who mutilated him.

programme.title: Criminal, (2016, Espionage Action)
programme.desc: The memories and skills of a deceased CIA agent are implanted into an unpredictable and dangerous convict in order to complete the agent's final assignment.

programme.title: Overlord, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Young Billy Young, (1969, Drama)
programme.desc: In this gun-slinging adventure, an aging lawman (Robert Mitchum) teams up with Young Billy Young (Robert Walker), a fast-draw outlaw on the run. But it’s an alliance that explodes when the lawman discovers a secret that could rip two towns apart!

programme.title: Johnny Guitar, (1954, Drama)
programme.desc: Gambling house operator Vienna seeks control of a town as archrival Emma Small sets out to force Vienna out of town. The timely arrival of Johnny Guitar thwarts Emma's dark plans, but doesn't prevent a showdown between the women.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun, (1967, Drama)
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven, (1960, Drama)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Riders Of The Whistling Pines, (1949, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry believes he has accidentally shot a man, but learns that the guilt lies with men trying to stop a destructive moth infestation. Will modern chemicals be used to save the day, against Gene?

programme.title: Rim Of The Canyon, (1949, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry, playing a dual role as his father and himself, is stranded by thieves who are searching for a stolen $30,000. A schoolteacher aids Gene with his search for the outlaws and the treasure.

programme.title: The Cowboy And The Indians, (1949, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry runs in to opposition when he tries to aid starving Navajos. The Chief is found unconscious and his necklace gone. Lakohna, the successor, is blamed. Gene and Lakohna join to seek justice.

programme.title: Doc, (1971, Drama)
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Red River, (1948, Drama)
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street, (2007, Musical)
programme.desc: Depp stars in the title role as a man unjustly sent to prison who vows revenge, not only for his punishment, but for the devastating consequences that happened to his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary, (2004, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Single girl Bridget Jones decides to turn over a new page in her life, channeling her thoughts, opinions, and insecurities into a diary. It's instead a hilarious chronicle of her adventures in this modern-romance classic based on the bestseller.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason, (2004, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: After six perfect weeks with boyfriend Mark Darcy, the mischievous Daniel Cleaver returns, claiming to be a reformed man. Can Bridget find a way to make true love last forever? A comedy that proves there's nothing like love to send you over the edge.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby, (2016, Comedy)
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is back, this time unexpectedly expecting a baby while unsure of the identity of the dad. Oscar® winners Renée Zellweger and Colin Firth are joined by Patrick Dempsey in this next chapter of Bridget's hysterically unpredictable life.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary, (2004, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Single girl Bridget Jones decides to turn over a new page in her life, channeling her thoughts, opinions, and insecurities into a diary. It's instead a hilarious chronicle of her adventures in this modern-romance classic based on the bestseller.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason, (2004, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: After six perfect weeks with boyfriend Mark Darcy, the mischievous Daniel Cleaver returns, claiming to be a reformed man. Can Bridget find a way to make true love last forever? A comedy that proves there's nothing like love to send you over the edge.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby, (2016, Comedy)
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is back, this time unexpectedly expecting a baby while unsure of the identity of the dad. Oscar® winners Renée Zellweger and Colin Firth are joined by Patrick Dempsey in this next chapter of Bridget's hysterically unpredictable life.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary, (2004, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Single girl Bridget Jones decides to turn over a new page in her life, channeling her thoughts, opinions, and insecurities into a diary. It's instead a hilarious chronicle of her adventures in this modern-romance classic based on the bestseller.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rubeus sends down Petz and her Droid to search and capture Chibi-Usa. Chibi-Usa is calling someone telling her she wants to go home.
programme.sub-title: In Search of the Silver Crystal: Chibi-Usa's Secret

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako and Makoto clash over their opposing views on love. Usagi takes the girls to a accessory shop, unaware that Petz and Calaveras run the place.
programme.sub-title: Dispute Over Love: Minako and Makoto's Conflict

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa's class is having a parent-child curry party. After hearing that neither Kenji nor Ikuko can attend, Usagi decides to go in their place.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Parental Love: The Curry Romance Triangle

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls enjoy some vacation time on an island. Chibi-Usa and Rei get into a small fight, causing an angry Chibi-Usa to go out to the sea alone.
programme.sub-title: The Beach, the Island and a Vacation: The Guardians' Break

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa leaves the house after being scolded by Usagi. Chibi-Usa begins to cry, which draws the attention of Rubeus and the Four Spectre Sisters.
programme.sub-title: Protect Chibi-Usa: Clash of the Ten Warriors

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Mamoru has a dream which a voice warns him that being with Usagi will bring her great misfortune. Meanwhile, Sailor Moon is attacked by a Droid.
programme.sub-title: Awaken the Sleeping Beauty: Mamoru's Distress

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Wiseman predicts that Chibi-Usa will appear at Hikawa Shrine. Learning of this, Rubeus orders Koan to go down there and eliminate their target.
programme.sub-title: Battle of the Flames of Love! Mars vs. Koan

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami enters the World Chess Tournament, but Bertheir is also there, forcing Ami to transform and reveal her identity as a Sailor Guardian to the enemy.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rubeus gives Petz and Calaveras one last chance to eliminate Rabbit and the Sailor Guardians once and for all.
programme.sub-title: Rubeus the Heartless: The Tragic Sisters

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa learns that Usagi is Sailor Moon. Eager to return to the future, she steals Usagi's Silver Crystal and flees, only to be ambushed by Rubeus.
programme.sub-title: A UFO Appears: The Sailor Guardians Abducted

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rubeus succeeds in taking four of the five Sailor Guardians prisoner. He demands that Sailor Moon bring Chibi-Usa and the Silver Crystal to him.
programme.sub-title: Defeat Rubeus: The Battle in Space

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa falls into a coma. Usagi and the others are at a loss, when a Sailor Guardian calling herself Sailor Pluto suddenly appears before them.
programme.sub-title: The Mysterious New Guardian: Sailor Pluto Appears

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Black Moon clan sends down its next operative, Esmeraude, to open the Dark Gate in 20th century Tokyo.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi is still depressed over Mamoru calling off their relationship. Ami and Mako try to cheer her up by taking Usagi to a promise ring workshop.
programme.sub-title: Shared Feelings: Usagi and Mamoru in Love Once Again

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A strange new flu is causing everyone to get sick, including the Sailor Guardians. Minako takes it upon herself to look after her sick friends.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Artemis is out to prove he is capable after being teased by Luna. He encounters a suspicious-looking man who is gathering stray animals.
programme.sub-title: Artemis's Adventure: The Monster Animal Kingdom

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The school test results are posted, and Ami is at the top of her class. She finds herself becoming isolated after rumors that she cheated on the test.
programme.sub-title: The Terrifying Illusion: Ami All Alone

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: After being out sick, Chibi-Usa returns to school eager to see her friends. But to her surprise, her friends and teachers begin attacking her.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Gate Is Completed? The Targeted Elementary School

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa decides to return to save her mother. With support from the Sailor Guardians and Tuxedo Mask, she opens the Door of Space and Time.
programme.sub-title: Journey to the Future: Battle in the Space-Time Corridor

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Arriving in the future, the Sailor Guardians stand in shock as they see the ruins of what used to be Crystal Tokyo.
programme.sub-title: The Shocking Future: Dimande's Dark Ambition

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Tuxedo Mask rescues Sailor Moon from Black Moon’s castle. But before they can all celebrate, a giant dragon appears to destroy the Crystal Palace.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Wiseman brainwashes Chibi-Usa and turns her into the Dark Queen. The Sailor Guardians return to present-day Earth to find her.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Queen: Birth of Black Lady

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Saphir learns of Wiseman’s true intentions and tries to warn his brother, only to be attacked by Wiseman himself.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The appearance of the giant Malefic Black Crystal Tower is wreaking havoc. Sailor Moon and the Guardians enter the tower to put an end to this.
programme.sub-title: Believing in Love and the Future: Usagi's Decision

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dark Gate opens, and Dark Energy spreads everywhere. To stop this, the Sailor Guardians must defeat Black Lady.
programme.sub-title: The Final Battle Between Light and Dark: Pledge of Love for the Future

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Peace has returned, and the Sailor Guardians take a moment to look back at their past battles as they prepare for their next challenge.

programme.title: Jogo de Espiões, (2001)
programme.desc: 2001. O agente aposentado da CIA Nathan Muir relembra como treinou Tom Bishop enquanto lutava contra a política da agência para libertá-lo de seus captores chineses. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Michael Redford, Brad Pitt, Robert Redford, Stephen Dillane, Marianne Jean-Baptiste, Matthew Marsh, Todd Boyce, Michael Paul Chan, Catherine McCormack, Larry Bryggman Diretor: Tony Scott

programme.title: Caçado, (2003)
programme.desc: 2003. Aaron Hallam é um perigoso assassino, que mata suas vítimas de um modo peculiar: ele perseguia caçadores de cervos como se fosse um esporte, em uma floresta de Portland. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tommy Lee Jones, Connie Nielsen, Benicio Del Toro, Leslie Stefanson, John Finn, José Zúñiga, Ron Canada, Mark Pellegrino, Jenna Boyd, Aaron DeCone Diretor: William Friedkin

programme.title: Xeque-Mate, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. Um caso de identidade equivocada coloca Slevin no meio de uma guerra sendo tramada por dois dos chefes do crime mais rivais da cidade. Sob vigilância constante do detetive Brikowski e do assassino Goodkat, ele deve pegá-los antes que eles o peguem. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Josh Hartnett, Bruce Willis, Lucy Liu, Ben Kingsley, Morgan Freeman, Stanley Tucci Diretor: Paul McGuigan

programme.title: Guerra Biológica, (1998)
programme.desc: 1998. Um imunologista da CIA se aposenta e vai morar com sua filha numa cidadezinha distante. Quando um miliciano detona uma bomba biológica na região, cabe ao ex-agente evitar o pior e salvar as vidas de todos. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Steven Seagal, Gailard Sartain, L.Q. Jones, Silas Weir Mitchell, Camilla Belle, Dan Beene, Damon Collazo, Whitney Yellow Robe, Brad Leland, Molly McClure Diretor: Dean Semler

programme.title: No Vale das Sombras, (2007)
programme.desc: 2007. Um investigador militar aposentado trabalha com um detetive da polícia para descobrir a verdade por trás do desaparecimento do seu filho. Gêneros: Crime Elenco: Tommy Lee Jones, Charlize Theron, Jason Patric, Susan Sarandon, James Franco, Barry Corbin, Josh Brolin, Frances Fisher, Wes Chatham, Jake McLaughlin Diretor: Paul Haggis

programme.title: O Suspeito da Rua Arlington, (1999)
programme.desc: 1999. Professor de história faz amizade com seus novos vizinhos, logo após ter salvado o filho deles. Desconfiado de que há algo, começa a achar que seus vizinhos têm um plano para explodir um prédio público e que são, na verdade, terroristas. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Jeff Bridges, Tim Robbins, Joan Cusack, Hope Davis, Robert Gossett, Mason Gamble, Spencer Treat Clark, Stanley Anderson, Viviane Vives, Lee Stringer Diretor: Mark Pellington

programme.title: Centurião, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. O Império Romano controla do Egito à Espanha, do leste até o Mar Negro. Entretanto ele enfrenta problemas no norte da Grã-Bretanha, devido às táticas de guerrilha usadas por seus inimigos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Andreas Wisniewski, Axelle Carolyn, Dave Legeno, David Morrissey, Dhaffer L Abidine, Dominic West, Jj Feild, Lee Ross. Diretor: Neil Marshall

programme.title: Código de Honra, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Um ex-coronel das forças especiais se torna um vigilante que mata criminosos, enquanto um ex-colega quer detê-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, James Russo, Louis Mandylor, Craig Sheffer, Griff Furst, Helena Mattsson, Rafael Petardi, R.D. Call, Michael Flynn, Ileana Huxley Diretor: Michael Winnick

programme.title: Fogo contra Fogo, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Um bombeiro fora de serviço testemunha um assassinato nas mãos de uma gangue de gangsters. Ele entra no programa de proteção a testemunhas até depor, mas não pode se esconder por muito tempo da gangue, então decide agir por conta própria. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Josh Duhamel, Bruce Willis, Rosario Dawson Diretor: David Barrett

programme.title: Shade - Nos Bastidores do Jogo, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Três vigaristas, decidem armar o maior golpe do ano e participam do jogo de cartas mais disputado de Las Vegas, enfrentando o mestre do pôquer para faturar um prêmio milionário. Só que para isso, eles vão ter que lidar com a máfia. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Stuart Townsend, Sylvester Stallone, Jamie Foxx, Gabriel Byrne, Thandiwe Newton, Melanie Griffith, Hal Holbrook, Roger Guenveur Smith, Bo Hopkins, Din... Diretor: Damian Nieman

programme.title: Blitz, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Blitz é um serial killer de Londres que está matando policiais. O inspetor-chefe Roberts e o sargento Brant, um detetive de polícia duro, inflexível e politicamente incorreto, terão a tarefa de tentar deter o psicopata. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Paddy Considine, Aidan Gillen, David Riley Diretor: Elliott Lester, Jordan Hill

programme.title: Imortais, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Teseu é um homem mortal escolhido por Zeus para liderar a luta contra o cruel rei Hiperião, que está causando estragos por toda a Grécia para obter uma arma capaz de destruir a humanidade. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Henry Cavill, Mickey Rourke, Luke Evans, Freida Pinto Diretor: Tarsem Singh

programme.title: Alvo Duplo, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Dois caras durões e pertencentes a lados opostos da lei vão unir forças para dar um ponto final em uma onda de assassinatos brutais, mas a tarefa não será nada fácil e muito sangue vai rolar. Gêneros: Crime Elenco: Christian, Slater, Stallone, Sylvester Diretor: Walter Hill

programme.title: À Prova de Fogo, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. No trabalho o Capitão Caleb vive pelo velho ditado dos bombeiros: Nunca deixe o seu companheiro para trás. Em casa, ele vive pelas próprias regras. Agora Caleb terá o seu trabalho mais árduo, resgatar o coração de sua esposa. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Kirk Cameron, Erin Bethea Diretor: Alex Kendrick

programme.title: Um Amor do Passado, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. Um jogador que lutou pela carreira em um time, decide se aposentar e volta para sua cidade, cuidadosamente se esquivando de problemas do passado. As coisas mudam quando ele é obrigado a encarar sua maior decepção – a garota que ele deixou escapar. programme.title: O Lado Bom da Vida, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Por conta de algumas atitudes erradas que deixaram as pessoas de seu trabalho assustadas, Pat Solitano Jr. perdeu quase tudo na vida: sua casa, o emprego e o casamento. Após passar um tempo internado em um sanatório, ele decide reconstruir sua vida. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Bradley, Cooper, De Niro, Jennifer, Lawrence, Robert Diretor: David O. Russell

programme.title: Abandonado no altar, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Nádia e Artem decidiram se casar. Mas suas mães estão contra esse relacionamento. Assim, elas decidem unir forças para impedir o casamento. Será que o amor verdadeiro passará por essa prova? programme.title: Querida Viola, (2014)

programme.title: Perseguição na Neve, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Veterano de guerra isolado na floresta encontra saco cheio de dinheiro durante caçada. Esconde rapidamente, mas não é o único que quer o dinheiro. Quando quatro criminosos armados chegam, o caçador vira presa. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Donnie Darko, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Donnie Darko não se dá bem com sua família, seus professores ou seus colegas de classe, mas acaba encontrando uma amiga em Gretchen. Seu outro amigo, porém, não é tão confiável assim: trata-se de Frank, um coelho gigante que só ele pode ver. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Os Intrusos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um grupo de amigos, na década de 1990, acredita ter encontrado o roubo perfeito: uma casa vazia com um cofre cheio de dinheiro. Quando o casal de idosos que ali mora chega mais cedo, a situação se inverte de repente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Fathers and Daughters, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um novelista mentalmente instável tenta criar sozinho a filha de cinco anos. Vinte anos depois, a garota cuida de crianças com problemas psicológicos e ainda tenta entender sua complicada infância. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Resgate da Princesa, (1970)

Chernomor, o malvado feiticeiro, rouba Mila diante dos olhos de Ruslan para transformar seu poder de amor em seu próprio poder mágico. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Robo-Dog, (1970)

programme.title: Loucas por Amor, Viciadas em Dinheiro, (1970)

programme.title: O Doutor da Felicidade, (1970)

programme.title: Segurança Nacional, (1970)

programme.title: Punhos da Vingança, (1970)

Ele planeja destruí-la e replantá-la à sua imagem e semelhança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Ashford J. Thomas, Daniel O'Reilly, Myrom Kingery, Neli Sabour, Robert Christopher Smith, Tyler Christopher, Vaune Suitt, Vernon Wells, Eva Ceja, Vadim Brunell Diretor: Noah Luke

programme.title: O Retorno do Dragão - A Cidade Perdida, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Segundo uma lenda milenar chinesa, a cada 60 anos uma forte tempestade de areia revelará o local onde um tesouro sagrado que estava perdido está localizado, a região de Dragon Gate. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jet Li - Xun Zhou Diretor: Hark Tsui

programme.title: As Tartarugas Ninja 3, (1991)
programme.desc: 1991. Um cetro mágico leva April para o Japão antigo. As Tartarugas Ninja viajam no tempo para salvá-la, mas Michelangelo se perde. Donatello, Raphael e Leonardo ajudam uma vila contra o malvado Lorde Norinaga. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Paige Turco, David Warner, Michelan Sisti Diretor: Michael Pressman

programme.title: Ricardo Coração de Leão, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Na Europa da Idade Média, os reinos da Inglaterra e da França estão a beira da guerra. O rei inglês, Henrique II, já com a idade avançada e a saúde já debilitada, prepara o seu sucessor, um de seus filhos, para governar e levar o reino a vitória. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Malcolm McDowell, Greg Maness, Burton Perez Diretor: Stefano Milla

programme.title: Crônicas da Tribo Fantasma, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Quando fósseis gigantes são descobertos perto da Mongólia, uma expedição é organizada para analisá-los. Quando uma explosão deixa os membros da equipe de escavação enterrados no subsolo, eles descobrem um templo ciclópico e bestas gigantes antigas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: As Tartarugas Ninja 2: O Segredo do Ooze, (1993)
programme.desc: 1993. Tartarugas Ninja buscam novo lar nos esgotos de Nova York e enfrentam o Destruidor, que usa o Ooze para criar capangas. Com ajuda de April, Jordan e Keno, precisam detê-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Elias Koteas, Paige Turco, Stuart Wilson, Sab Shimono, Vivian Wu, Mark Caso Diretor: Stuart Gillard

programme.title: Deus da guerra, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. Na dinastia Ming, onde o jovem general Qi Jiguang conquista uma importante vitória contra os piratas japoneses, comandando o exército chinês. Quando, quatro anos depois, sua nação é mais uma vez atacada, Qi se vê obrigado a retornar aos campos de batalha. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Wenzhuo Zhao, Sammo Kam-Bo Hung, Regina Wan, Yasuaki Kurata, Keisuke Koide, Xiajie Cai, Naohide Funaki, Wei Hu, Timmy Hung, Luxia Jiang Diretor: Gordon Chan

programme.title: O Mito, (2005)
programme.desc: 2005. O arqueólogo Jack continua tendo sonhos recorrentes de uma vida passada, onde ele é o grande general Meng Yi, que jurou proteger uma princesa chamada Ok-Soo. Jack decide ir investigar tudo com seu amigo William. programme.title: Império Proibido, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. No início do século 18, o cartógrafo Jonathan Green empreende uma viagem científica da Europa para o Oriente. Passando pela Transilvânia e cruzando as montanhas dos Cárpatos, ele encontra uma pequena vila perdida na floresta. programme.title: Depois do Apocalipse, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher solitária luta contra a fome, a sede, uma perna quebrada e criaturas estranhas em um local apocalíptico. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Rastros do Além, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois de um evento cataclísmico o mundo passa a viver uma nova realidade onde os vivos e os mortos coexistem. Após nove anos de convivência pacífica, uma jovem é ameaçada e se arrisca para descobrir o por quê desta mudança repentina. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Depois do Apocalipse, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher solitária luta contra a fome, a sede, uma perna quebrada e criaturas estranhas em um local apocalíptico. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Última Peça, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Paula organiza uma festa surpresa para seu irmão e, quando está prestes a terminar de decorar a casa com muitos dinossauros, descobre que um dos brinquedos veio faltando uma peça. Para recuperá-la, ela tem que enfrentar o malvado dono da loja. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Sempre de Olho - Uma História Marble Hornet, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma equipe de jornalistas de uma cidade pequena encontra uma caixa com algumas fitas de vídeo. Ao assistirem aos filmes, eles se deparam com uma figura sem rosto torturando uma família. E logo descobrem que a criatura também os está seguindo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Folaké descobre o cadáver do seu pai e as suas suspeitas recaem sobre Bola; Bola quer enviar os restos mortais do seu pai para Lagos; os últimos desejos do Chefe Abayomi são revelados. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Bola quer unir o Conselho à sua causa e ameaça Jacob se ele ficar em Lagos; os associados de Jacob estão nervosos por Abayomi estar morto; o tribunal aceita o pedido de Bola e cancela o testamento; Folaké descobre a duplicidade de Prospero. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob visita Folaké e descobre a traição de seu amigo; Bola diz a Prospero que pode influenciar o setor energético; Lerato está no hospital e corre o risco de sofrer um aborto espontâneo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob e Folake têm um filho e ela anuncia a Jacob que vai a Lagos para apanhar seu irmão; Bola é preso pelo assassinato de seu pai; o testamento é reconhecido: Jacob se torna Chefe iorubá; graças às suas ligações, Bola sai da prisão. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob, um brilhante homem de negócios, está prestes a obter um grande contrato governamental da área de energia. Seu chefe revela a ele que é seu pai biológico e Jacob promete realizar o sonho do homem: construir um império e manter a família unida. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Double Dragon, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jimmy captura seu irmão Billy e o leva ao Mestre das Sombras, mas o vilão se volta contra ele. Para escapar, os irmãos se transformam e enfrenam o Mestre. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jacob confessa a sua infidelidade a Lerato e parte; Prospero tenta subornar Glenda e oferece o seu trabalho em troca de informações; Jacob apoia o seu irmão e investe na empresa de segurança que acaba de criar. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Guardiões, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um guarda-costas é encarregado de proteger a filha de um importante cientista, para que a pesquisa de sua empresa não caia em mãos erradas. Quando um grupo de mercenários surge para roubar o material, será preciso lutar para sobreviver. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Condução Perigosa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Simon Keller, um misterioso ladrão, planeja roubar um banco e obriga um antigo piloto de corrida a dirigir o carro de fuga. Após o roubo, eles enfrentam policiais e mafiosos em uma alucinante perseguição na costa da Austrália. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Passagem para a Vida, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um criminoso misterioso chega em uma pequena cidade planejando roubar o banco local, presumindo que tudo vai correr bem. Mas quando ele encontra um professor aposentado de poesia, seus planos tomam uma rumo improvável. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Vigilante Mascarado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Lutador profissional abandona a vida de violência e se torna pastor em uma pequena cidade. Entretanto, a criminalidade do local o obriga a retomar os velhos hábitos. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Outra Vida, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma cientista desenvolve uma droga revolucionária que induz realidades virtuais e expande a sensação de tempo. O governo tenta assumir projeto, e agora ela precisa decidir como usar sua poderosa criação. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Laços de um Crime, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma família de policiais sofre um verdadeiro colapso moral. Isso porque dois irmãos, sufocados pela sombra do pai, o ex-chefe de polícia, precisam investigar um crime que eles próprios cometeram. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Acima das Nuvens, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Há 20 anos, Maria ficou famosa por sua interpretação no teatro. Agora, ela tem que enfrentar que uma jovem estrela de Hollywood irá interpretar o mesmo papel. Além disso, ela é convidada a dividir o palco com a novata, mas em outro papel. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Homem Comum, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um criminoso de guerra procurado mundo afora conhece uma empregada e um estranho relacionamento surge entre eles. Quando a calmaria parece estabelecida na vida dele, ela descobre que há uma recompensa milionária para quem souber onde o fugitivo está. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Life - Um Retrato de James Dean, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1955, o fotógrafo Dennis Stock acompanha James Dean em uma viagem para a fazenda da família do ator. No local, Stock registra as imagens mais famosas de toda a carreira de Dean. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A História de Esau, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois de anos ausente, escritor retorna à casa da família em Israel para cuidar do pai doente. Lá ele enfrenta seu irmão mais novo amargurado, que assumiu toda a responsabilidade pela padaria da família e se casou com a mulher a quem ambos amavam. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Apex, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Cinco caçadores pagam para caçar um homem em uma ilha deserta, e acabam se tornando a presa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Faça um Desejo!, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Quatro crianças descobrem uma criatura mágica que concede desejos em uma viagem à praia. Elas só não imaginavam que o vizinho esquisitão da casa ao lado também está de olho nesses poderes. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Relógio Encantado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angel é uma garota tímida que odeia dizer não. Ela encontra um relógio mágico que realiza desejos e a torna incrivelmente popular. Mas essa nova vida talvez não a deixe realmente feliz. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Onde Fica o Paraíso, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante a II Guerra Mundial, uma pesquisadora durona e solitária abriga um menino fugindo dos bombardeios em Londres. Aos poucos, ela acaba por abrir seu coração em uma emocionante jornada de amizade e imaginação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Alex Rider Contra o Tempo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Alex Rider, adolescente britânico habilidoso em linguística, mergulho, artes marciais e tiro, é recrutado pelo MI6. Sua primeira missão é investigar o bilionário Darrius Sayle, que fez suspeitas doações de megacomputadores às escolas da Inglaterra. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Doutor da Felicidade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Doutor Knock é um ex-bandido que se tornou um médico e chega à pequena aldeia de Saint-Maurice para fazer os moradores acreditarem que não são saudáveis e, assim, poder exercer sua profissão de forma lucrativa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma Paixão em Seoul, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Kim é uma jovem filipina que vive com seus pais superprotetores. Quando descobre uma vaga para ensinar inglês a um empresário em Seul, ela foge para uma vida nova. Ela só não espera viver um triângulo amoroso com seu aluno e o assistente dele. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Química do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma dedicada cientista, determinada a resolver a guerra dos sexos, arrisca sua própria felicidade para provar que a ciência explica tudo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 2001. Cartman recebe como herança de sua avó um milhão de dólares e decide cumprir seu maior sonho: comprar um parque de diversão somente para ele, no qual ele não precisa fazer fila para subir nos brinquedos, já que ninguém mais pode entrar. programme.title: 2001. Um dos rapazes mais velhos ensinam para o Cartman como masturbar um cachorro. programme.title: 2001. No dia da foto da escola, Kenny, fazendo graça, entra no seu moletom de cabeça pra baixo, deixando no lugar de sua cabeça, sua bunda. programme.title: 2001. O primo do Kyle, que também se chama Kyle, veio de Connecticut para visitar sua mãe em South Park. Porém, apesar da mesma idade, os primos não tem nada em comum. Ao chegar em Aspen, Stan, que não é nada experiente, se vê forçado a competir contra um campeão de ski. programme.title: 2002. A turma visita uma granja onde os meninos ficam sabendo que "vitela" é uma vaquinha bebê e ficam horrorizados. Eles decidem libertar estas criaturinhas e encontrar uma maneira de levar todas elas para o quarto de Stan. programme.title: 2002. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Toni Wurts

programme.title: 2002. Bebe é a primeira aluna na turma que começa a ganhar peitos, e os rapazes da sala, sem entender o motivo, começam a ficar loucos por ela e acham que tudo o que ela faz é genial. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Jennifer Howell, Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
